title: Define E2E test plan for Apple Glass migration
body: Establish the end-to-end testing strategy for the Apple Glass theme migration; include scope, success criteria, risk mitigation, and alignment with the END2END_PLAN.md.

title: Set up Playwright framework and CI integration
body: Initialize Playwright config, install dependencies, and wire tests to CI.

title: Create test scripts for agent groups 1-3
body: Write automated tests for onboarding and work-item creation for engineers 1-3.

title: Create test scripts for agent groups 4-6
body: Write automated tests for onboarding and work-item creation for engineers 4-6.

title: Create test scripts for agent groups 7-9
body: Write automated tests for onboarding and work-item creation for engineers 7-9.

title: Create test scripts for agent group 10 + coordinator
body: Write automated tests for onboarding and work-item creation for engineer 10 and coordinator.

title: Integrate E2E tests into CI (GitHub Actions)
body: Add CI workflow steps to run Playwright tests on PRs and push results.

title: Run full E2E suite and publish results
body: Execute the full set of E2E tests and publish pass/fail metrics.

title: Track defects and assign to agents
body: Create defects for any failures, assign to responsible agent owners, and track status.

title: Documentation and evidence collection
body: Document test results, evidence, and reusability considerations.
